name: Pearl Cohen
message: An international law firm of affiliated local firms – Pearl Cohen Zedek Latzer Baratz in Israel, Pearl Cohen Zedek Latzer Baratz LLP in the United States, and Pearl Cohen Zedek Latzer Baratz UK LLP in the United Kingdom, Pearl Cohen provides innovative legal services for innovation-driven enterprises, including Fortune 500, start-ups and entrepreneurs, investors, academic institutions and government-related entities.
